name: implementation-plan
description: Markdown sibling of the implementation plan: goal, architecture summary, a phased timeline with tasks, acceptance criteria, and validation evidence. The agent pre-renders the phases/acceptanceCriteria/validationEvidence collections into lists before substitution.

slots.description: Small overline label above the title.
One-sentence framing of what the plan delivers.
Pre-rendered extra header meta (owner, target date, branch) as an inline list.
Concrete outcome the plan produces, plus optional non-goals.
Architecture summary: surfaces touched, new modules, key contract changes.
Pre-rendered phases: one '### heading' per phase with nested task checkboxes and tags.
Pre-rendered criteria checklist; check items that are satisfied.
Pre-rendered list of evidence rows: typecheck, tests, manual QA, observability.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.phases[]: { when: string, name: string, description: string, tasks: [{ text: string, done: boolean }], tags: string[] }
